description: Fixture: ActionProposal → ActionAdmission → RuntimeReceipt requirement chain. Illustrates the full action admission pipeline for the execute_ingest_fusion action class.
invariant: Agent action requires action admission before effectful runtime execution.
canonicalLoop: Observe -> Anchor -> Normalize -> Propose -> Explain -> Verify -> Govern -> Act -> Receipt -> Learn
governStep: ActionAdmissionPolicy evaluates the action proposal after claims are admitted.

actionProposal.description: Execute bounded ingest/fusion workflow for GAIA tile set alpha-7.

policyDecision.remediation: Proceed with bounded execution. Record a RuntimeReceipt upon completion.

runtimeReceiptRequirement.description: A RuntimeReceipt MUST be recorded upon completion of the action. The receipt must reference the actionId, policyDecisionId, and outcome.

consumers.guardrail-fabric: Owns ActionAdmissionPolicy; emits PolicyDecision as the execution gate.
consumers.agentplane: Consumes the ActionAdmission PolicyDecision before executing the action; records the RuntimeReceipt.
consumers.sociosphere: Coordinates the Act and Receipt steps via the canonical loop.
consumers.memorymesh: Records the RuntimeReceipt as a learnable provenance artifact for the Learn step.
